name: Arafat Hossen
bio: Specializing in statistical computing, operational data pipelines, and analytics infrastructure. Transforming raw transactional data into high-fidelity business intelligence frameworks.

bullets: Architected foundational operational data structures, streamlining student onboarding and performance telemetry tracking.
Automated repetitive workflow routines using advanced scripting and macros, reducing manual management latency by 40%.
Designed comprehensive reporting models used weekly to audit operational workflows, financial projections, and student milestones.
Cleaned and engineered anomalies out of unstructured transactional datasets for small-to-medium enterprise clients.
Delivered interactive corporate intelligence dashboards, enabling non-technical stakeholders to identify hidden structural bottlenecks.

projects.title: Edu'tutors Operations Architecture
projects.description: Architected the core operational data infrastructure and automated student lifecycle tracking pipelines. Engineered custom financial performance models and macro-driven workflows to systematically scale cross-functional tuition operations.

projects.title: Enterprise Business Performance Engine
projects.description: Engineered an end-to-end telemetry system to ingest, clean, and structure high-volume transactional records. Applied advanced multivariate statistical modeling to isolate hidden market trends and deployed crisp executive-level visual dashboards.

projects.title: Automated Automotive Valuation Engine
projects.tech: Machine Learning • Predictive Modeling • Regression Analytics
projects.description: Engineered an end-to-end predictive valuation system utilizing multivariate regression algorithms to estimate market vehicle pricing. Constructed automated data preprocessing pipelines to handle non-linear feature interactions, structural anomalies, and high-cardinality categorical data, significantly optimizing model pricing accuracy.
